tool.name: Reduction
tool.command: mkdir output && ln -s $output_dir sns_output && export HOME=/root && ln -s $data_dir /app/data && cp sns_output/*partial.txt output && echo "running reduction..." && pixi run --as-is --manifest-path /app python /app/scripts/mantid/simple_reduction.py --event-file $input_file --template $template_file --output-dir output > >(tee -a $output) 2> >(tee -a $output >&2) && ls output/ && cp output/* sns_output && run_number=\$(echo "$input_file" | sed -E 's/.*_([0-9]+)\.nxs\.h5\$/\1/') && echo \$run_number && cat $input_file && cp output/REFL_*_combined_data_auto.txt $reflectivity
